name: Mummy's Path Deluxe
author: Poki
description: Mummy's Path Deluxe is a platform puzzle game that challenges you to help the Mummy reunite its head with its body! Strategically place arrows to create a path for the rolling head to reach the body. Collect diamonds and scarabs along the way to maximize your score. The quicker you complete the puzzle, the higher your score! The best part? You can change the Mummy's head to different looks! How fast can you reattach the Mummy's head to the body? How to play Mummy's Path Deluxe? Click and hold to select the arrow. Release the mouse to place the arrow in the right position. Press the "Go!" button to start. Who created Mummy's Path Deluxe? Mummy's Path Deluxe is created by FM Studio. Play their other arcade game Shoot'n'Shout Turbo ! They have great horror games on Poki such as Forgotten Hill Disillusion: Flora&Fauna , Rise of Pico , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 2 , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 3 , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 4 , Forgotten Hill Disillusion: The Library , Little Cabin in the Woods , Forgotten Hill Memento: Buried Things , Forgotten Hill Memento: Love Beyond , Forgotten Hill Memento: Playground , Forgotten Hill: Fall , Forgotten Hill: Puppeteer and Forgotten Hill: Surgery ! How can I play Mummy's Path Deluxe for free? You can play Mummy's Path Deluxe for free on Poki. Can I play Mummy's Path Deluxe on mobile devices and desktop? Mummy's Path Deluxe can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
